actions: Deploy WASA drainage pumping teams immediately
Activate emergency traffic rerouting on flooded corridors
Deploy RESCUE 1122 swift water rescue units
Issue public flood advisory via SMS broadcast
Coordinate with PDMA for relief resource staging
Activate EPA Punjab industrial emission monitoring teams
Issue public health advisory for respiratory patients
Enforce odd-even vehicle restriction on arterial roads
Deploy Health Department mobile medical camps in affected zones
Coordinate with PHA for tree plantation emergency drive
Deploy Traffic Police for accident site management
Activate emergency rerouting around accident zone
Broadcast public advisory to avoid affected roads
Coordinate with Punjab Emergency Service for ambulance dispatch
